title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Geodis India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Geodis India
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!
